message:
fix(rpc): validate network and address in Windows TCP transport (bd-22)

dialRPC reads network/address from bd.sock JSON file and passes them
directly to net.DialTimeout. A tampered file could redirect to a remote
host. Add validateEndpoint() to ensure network is "tcp" and address
binds to 127.0.0.1 or localhost only.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/granite
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
